gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6900 XT (sienna_cichlid, LLVM 14.0.3, DRM 3.44, 5.17.0-1-amd64)
notes: The logos are properly displayed in VR during startup, but right after the FMOD logo fades away, the VR session closes (reverting to Steam VR Home), leaving an unresponsive black window.
title: The Last Clockwinder

notes:
Initially had problem finding VR runtime. Others had this issue too [1] and was fixed by setting SteamVR as the OpenXR runtime in Steam VR settings (after enabling Advanced settings) [2].

However, the game Pontoco logo comes up on the desktop and the headset, but then the headset goes black. The desktop window for the game freezes and must be killed.

* [1] https://steamcommunity.com/app/1755100/discussions/0/3418808280400127870/
* [2] https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2791489010
title: The Last Clockwinder
